    2026

    • Courtney N. Reed, Marta Ferreira, Mónica Mendes, Pedro Galvão-Ferreira, Marion Koelle, Alice C Haynes, Fiona Bell, Alexandra Teixeira Riggs, Laia Turmo Vidal, Mathilde Gouin, Vineetha Rallabandi, and Karen Anne Cochrane. 2026. In-Situ Seeding: Entangling Place & Technology through Sensory Data Dialogues. Proceedings of the Twentieth International Conference on Tangible, Embedded, and Embodied Interaction (TEI '26'). DOI: 10.1145/3731459.3774489 ✧ [PDF]
